name: 20 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP
about: 20 MG Rosuvastatin Tablets IP is a general medicine used to lower cholesterol and triglyceride levels in the blood. As per doctor suggestion, it is recommended to take this tablet orally once daily with or without food. The tablet is manufactured in India and comes in the form of tablets. Each tablet contains 20mg of Rosuvastatin. It is advised to store the tablet in a cool place.
